text.title: tree-testing Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the tree-testing methodology end-to-end.

step.name: build-tree
step.action: Strip all visual content; flatten to indented text list. Cap depth at 4.

step.name: author-tasks
step.action: Write 5-8 tasks ranked by importance; mix easy/hard.

step.name: calc-sample-size
step.action: Compute n ≥30 per arm using power calc.

step.name: field-and-collect
step.action: Field via Optimal Workshop / Maze / UserTesting. Collect success + directness + first-click per task.

step.name: analyse-and-recommend
step.action: Compute per-task metrics; flag low-directness tasks. Report with confidence intervals.
step.decision-gate: If directness <60% on critical task, refactor IA before next round.
